EmailTemplate.name: AES - Self-booking Invite Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder to book a call to proceed your application with Alliance Extra Staff
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
REMINDER: BOOK TIME TO PROCEED YOUR APPLICATION.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Hope you're well! We are excited to proceed your application with us and have tried to reach you via phone to discuss next steps. This is a kind reminder to please let us know when is a good time to talk and we'll get one of our recruiters to call you back.
BOOK A CALL WITH A RECRUITER
If you have any questions, please feel free to call our friendly staff on 1300 662 511.
We are looking forward to working with you!
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Extra Staff
